level_signals: 4+ years in strategic finance or BizOps
0→1 and 1→10 scope signals a senior or lead-level individual contributor

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 8+ years of relevant experience, including 4+ years in strategic finance or BizOps.
including 4+ years in strategic finance or BizOps

You can model complex structures such as usage-based pricing, commit deals, revenue shares, referral / reseller programs, and co-sell motions. You communicate tradeoffs clearly and help partners negotiate with confidence.
You can stand up the "boring but critical" plumbing that makes partnerships work at scale: contract-to-cash workflows, invoicing and partner payments, tracking, attribution, and post-deal governance.
You have strong spreadsheet skills and are comfortable with data (SQL, BI tools, or equivalent).
You can use AI tools and agents to automate analysis and reduce manual work.
You are excited by partnership-led growth and can translate ambiguous partner opportunities into concrete business cases, decision memos, and operating plans.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: We are also open to investment banking / venture capital and consulting backgrounds with analytical skill sets.

scope.surface: Strategic Partnerships organization — hyperscalers, LLM providers, and broader technology ecosystem
scope.business_model: B2B2C / platform with hyperscaler and LLM provider partnerships
primary_metrics_inferred: Revenue share accuracy and billing flows
Partnership performance dashboards and QBR outcomes
core_responsibilities: Own partnership economics: Build models and business cases for strategic partnerships (hyperscalers, LLM providers, platforms), including pricing, unit economics, and scenario analyses.

Operationalize partnerships end-to-end: Design and run the processes that turn signed deals into shipped value: partner onboarding, billing flows, revenue share calculations, internal enablement, and ongoing reporting.
Create clear measurement: Define what "success" means per partner (financial and product outcomes) and build lightweight dashboards and operating cadence to track it.
Support negotiation and governance: Prepare negotiation support (term comparisons, guardrails, redlines) and set up post-sign governance (QBRs, escalations, renewal readiness).
Build an AI-native function: Use AI agents and automation to accelerate partner analysis, contract summarization, and reporting—prioritizing speed and correctness over manual workflows.

green_flags: Clear scope and ownership: sole owner of partnership finance and ops function
Explicit experience range (8+ years / 4+ years) reduces ambiguity
Open to IB/VC/consulting backgrounds — broadens candidate pool
AI-native function signals modern tooling expectations
0→1 and 1→10 framing indicates meaningful greenfield scope
red_flags: No location or remote/hybrid policy stated — fully unclear
No posting date available — unclear how fresh the role is
